data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of clearing balance and history on each redemption. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. The existing evidence focuses on booking confirmations and payment flows but lacks any reference to the clearing of balance and history upon redemption, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of clearing balance and history on each redemption.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the clearing of balance and history on each redemption.
